alkylation reagent: alkylated by adding final 20 mM Iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated by adding final 20 mM Iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: on-bead tryptic digestion by adding a digestion buffer (2 M Urea + 500 ng of sequencing grade trypsin per sample)
collision energy: fragmented using beam-type collisional induced dissociation (HCD) at 65% normalized collision energy
enrichment method: made it challenging to get enough material for affinity enrichment/mass spectrometry (AE/MS) analysis
fractionation method: pooled TMT labelled peptide digest was subjected to mini high pH reversed-phase micro-column-based fractionation
fragmentation method: fragmented using beam-type collisional induced dissociation (HCD)
instrument: analyzed on Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: TMT labeling efficiency was identified to be >99%
